name: example-report
title: Report
description: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.

description_i18n.en: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 适用于任何业务或技术主题的灵活长篇报告文档，包含标题区、执行摘要、正文章节、表格、图表模块和附录。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 適用於任何商業或技術主題的彈性長篇報告文件，包含標題區、執行摘要、正文章節、表格、圖表區塊和附錄。
description_i18n.ja: ビジネスまたは技術テーマに対応する柔軟な長文レポート文書。タイトル、エグゼクティブサマリー、本文セクション、表、チャート、付録を含みます。
description_i18n.ko: 비즈니스 또는 기술 주제에 맞게 조정되는 유연한 장문 보고서 문서입니다. 제목, 요약, 본문 섹션, 표, 차트 블록, 부록을 포함합니다.
description_i18n.de: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.fr: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.ru: Гибкий многостраничный отчет для любой бизнес- или технической темы: титульный блок, резюме, разделы, таблицы, диаграммы и приложение.
description_i18n.es: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.

description_i18n.id: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.nl: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.ar: مستند تقرير طويل ومرن لأي موضوع تجاري أو تقني، مع عنوان وملخص تنفيذي وأقسام وجداول ومخططات وملحق.
description_i18n.tr: Flexible long-form report document for any business or technical topic, with a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix.
description_i18n.uk: Гнучкий довгий звіт для будь-якої бізнесової або технічної теми з титульним блоком, резюме, розділами, таблицями, діаграмами та додатком.

query.en: Create a {{length}} {{reportType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} using {{designSystem}}. Build a single-file flowing HTML report by copying `assets/template.html`, then paste and adapt section layouts from `references/layouts.md`. Include a title block, executive summary, body sections, tables, chart blocks, and appendix as appropriate.
query.zh-CN: 使用 {{designSystem}}，为 {{audience}} 创建一份关于 {{topic}} 的 {{length}} {{reportType}}。复制 `assets/template.html`，并从 `references/layouts.md` 粘贴和调整章节布局，生成单文件、纵向滚动的 HTML 报告。根据需要包含标题区、执行摘要、正文章节、表格、图表区块和附录。
